  context={"endpoint"}

API used to get the PlanningUnit list for specified ProgramIds

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Array of programIds that you want to get PlanningUnit list for","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the PlanningUnit list","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of PlanningUnit list","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
